creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
Hello,

A newly created poudriere jail instance (amd64) built from obj dated stable/14-n266260-541d89067add: Tue Jan  9 with a brand new ports tree ( git -C /usr/ports rev-list --count --first-parent HEAD reports 653390) displays the following in the console after it starts up but before fetching anything

###
grep: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/abseil/work/abseil-cpp-20230125.3/CMake/AbseilHelpers.cmake: No such file or directory
###

The build run seems to be continuing. Not sure if the above might affect the build.
This port is not in the local build list.
